title: Match reparented node notification order against Godot contracts
description: Derived from prd/PORT_GODOT_TO_RUST_PLAN.md Phase 3 SceneTree subset and lifecycle semantics. Acceptance: focused tests prove enter_tree/exit_tree/ready ordering when a node is reparented at runtime, with upstream Godot treated as the oracle.

title: Match nested PackedScene ownership propagation during instancing
description: Derived from prd/PORT_GODOT_TO_RUST_PLAN.md Phase 3 packed-scene subset and Phase 5 instancing edge cases. Acceptance: tests prove ownership propagation through nested instancing and duplicate instantiation boundaries.

title: Match unique-name lookup across nested instanced scenes
description: Derived from prd/PORT_GODOT_TO_RUST_PLAN.md scene semantics and repin revalidation goals. Acceptance: focused oracle-backed tests cover unique-name resolution through nested instanced scene trees.

title: Match SubResource ID rewrite semantics during save round-trips
description: Derived from prd/PORT_GODOT_TO_RUST_PLAN.md resource load/save subset. Acceptance: saver/load round-trip tests prove deterministic SubResource ID rewrite behavior and non-match edge cases.
oracle_source: upstream/godot ResourceSaver and ResourceLoader round-trip behavior

title: Match resource cache invalidation after in-memory mutation
description: Derived from prd/PORT_GODOT_TO_RUST_PLAN.md richer resource support and cache semantics. Acceptance: repeated-load tests prove cache sharing and invalidation rules after resource mutation.
oracle_source: upstream/godot resource cache and mutation behavior

title: Match UID versus res:// resolution precedence for aliased resources
description: Derived from prd/PORT_GODOT_TO_RUST_PLAN.md resource loading contracts. Acceptance: loader-path tests compare UID and res:// precedence against upstream Godot for aliased resource paths.
oracle_source: upstream/godot resource path and UID resolution behavior

title: Match deferred signal FIFO delivery with mixed one-shot listeners
description: Derived from prd/PORT_GODOT_TO_RUST_PLAN.md signal ordering and notification tracing goals. Acceptance: deterministic trace tests prove FIFO deferred delivery with mixed persistent and one-shot listeners.
oracle_source: upstream/godot CONNECT_DEFERRED and one-shot signal behavior

title: Match signal argument forwarding for typed and untyped callables
description: Derived from prd/PORT_GODOT_TO_RUST_PLAN.md signal and object-model contracts. Acceptance: tests prove forwarded Variant arguments match oracle behavior for typed and untyped signal callables.

title: Match input snapshot edge transitions across fixed and idle frames
description: Derived from prd/PORT_GODOT_TO_RUST_PLAN.md input subset and frame-loop correctness. Acceptance: tests cover press/release edge transitions across idle and fixed frames using the engine-owned input snapshot API.

title: Match input-map action fallback semantics for unmapped events
description: Derived from prd/PORT_GODOT_TO_RUST_PLAN.md broader input handling. Acceptance: bounded tests prove fallback semantics for unmapped events, duplicated bindings, and empty action tables.

title: Match viewport clear mode and camera composition against oracle captures
description: Derived from prd/PORT_GODOT_TO_RUST_PLAN.md first 2D render slice. Acceptance: viewport and camera composition tests compare clear mode and layering behavior against oracle captures.
oracle_source: upstream/godot Viewport and Camera2D composition captures

title: Match Node2D canvas ordering with z-index and parent transforms
description: Derived from prd/PORT_GODOT_TO_RUST_PLAN.md 2D node subset and transforms. Acceptance: render parity tests prove z-index and inherited parent-transform ordering.
oracle_source: upstream/godot CanvasItem ordering and transform propagation

title: Match fixed-step body synchronization after external transform writes
description: Derived from prd/PORT_GODOT_TO_RUST_PLAN.md first 2D physics integration. Acceptance: deterministic physics tests prove body state synchronization after runtime transform overrides.
oracle_source: upstream/godot PhysicsServer2D and Node2D synchronization behavior

title: Match collision registration updates after shape replacement
description: Derived from prd/PORT_GODOT_TO_RUST_PLAN.md collision overlap coverage goals. Acceptance: overlap and broadphase tests prove registration updates after collision shape replacement.

title: Match ClassDB default-property filtering for script-exported fields
description: Derived from prd/PORT_GODOT_TO_RUST_PLAN.md property compatibility rules and 4.6.1 repin fallout. Acceptance: API probe and runtime tests agree on default-property filtering for script-exported fields.
oracle_source: apps/godot probe output and 4.6.1 property captures

title: Match ClassDB method metadata for inherited node APIs
description: Derived from prd/PORT_GODOT_TO_RUST_PLAN.md core object-model and API extraction goals. Acceptance: apps/godot probe output and runtime metadata agree for inherited node methods and flags.

title: Match 3D transform propagation for parent-child Node3D hierarchies
description: Derived from prd/PORT_GODOT_TO_RUST_PLAN.md first 3D node subset. Acceptance: focused fixtures prove parent-child transform propagation and local/global transform semantics.

title: Match Camera3D and light registration in the first 3D render slice
description: Derived from prd/PORT_GODOT_TO_RUST_PLAN.md first 3D render path. Acceptance: 3D fixtures prove camera and light registration is reflected in measurable render or oracle state.
oracle_source: upstream/godot Camera3D and light registration behavior

title: Match 3D physics golden traces for single-body deterministic scenes
description: Derived from prd/PORT_GODOT_TO_RUST_PLAN.md initial 3D physics hooks. Acceptance: deterministic single-body 3D scenes produce golden traces comparable to upstream captures.

title: Match runtime CI matrix coverage to active parity domains
description: Derived from prd/PORT_GODOT_TO_RUST_PLAN.md runtime hardening and release discipline. Acceptance: CI lanes explicitly cover each active parity domain and fail cleanly when evidence commands regress.
oracle_source: CI runtime slice coverage and parity gates

title: Revalidate browser-served editor shell against 4.6.1-backed runtime behavior
description: Derived from the later-phase browser editor goal. Acceptance: the automated editor smoke test stays green, the browser-served shell starts cleanly, and the manual browser checklist remains accurate for the 4.6.1-backed runtime.
